Row.Text: Romulus
Father of Rome

The Government Plaza and its buildings each grant melee units +1 [ICON_Strength] Combat Strength. Each district in the [ICON_Capital] Capital provides +1 [ICON_Food] Food and +1 [ICON_Production] Production. Domestic [ICON_TradeRoute] Trade Routes to the [ICON_Capital] Capital gain +0.5 [ICON_Food] Food, +0.5 [ICON_Production] Production, and +0.5 [ICON_Gold] Gold per specialty district in the Capital.
Eternal Foundation
Respects civilizations with strong military forces. Dislikes those with weak armies.
Your military strength is admirable. Rome approves.
Your army is pathetically weak. Build more soldiers or face the consequences.
Romulus respects your military strength.
Romulus looks down on your weak army.
Father of Rome
+1 [ICON_Strength] Combat Strength.

Mighty Romulus, legendary founder of the Eternal City, your people look to you for strength and vision. Build Rome into a beacon of civilization — invest in your Government Plaza to empower your warriors, fortify your capital with districts that fuel your economy through trade, and lead your melee forces to glory on the battlefield. The world awaits the mark of Rome!
罗慕路斯
罗马之父

市政广场及其建筑各为近战单位提供 +1 [ICON_Strength] 战斗力。[ICON_Capital] 首都每个区域提供 +1 [ICON_Food] 粮食和 +1 [ICON_Production] 生产力。首都 [ICON_Capital] 每个专业化区域给通往首都 [ICON_Capital] 的国内贸易路线 [ICON_TradeRoute] +0.5 [ICON_Food] 粮食、+0.5 [ICON_Production] 生产力，+0.5 [ICON_Gold] 金币。
永恒之基
尊重拥有强大军事力量的文明，鄙视军力薄弱的国家。
你的军事力量令人钦佩。罗马认可你。
你的军队弱得可悲。多造些士兵，否则承担后果。
罗慕路斯尊重你的军事实力。
罗慕路斯看不起你薄弱的军队。
罗马之父
[ICON_Strength] 战斗力+1。
伟大的罗慕路斯，永恒之城的传奇建立者，你的人民期盼着你的力量与远见。将罗马建设为文明的灯塔——建设市政广场以增强你的勇士，用区域强化首都、通过贸易驱动经济，率领近战部队在战场上赢得荣耀。世界正等待着罗马的印记！
